metadata.description: Short code for the primary region, used in resource names (e.g. swc)
Short code for the DR region, used in resource names (e.g. neu)
Name of the primary resource group
Name of the DR resource group
Deploy the secondary (DR) region. When false, only the primary region is built. Set true later to add cross-region active/active without redeploying primary.
Common tags applied to every resource
Object IDs of Key Vault administrators
Object IDs of principals (humans/auditors) granted Cosmos data-plane access. Needed because Cosmos local auth is disabled.
Fabric capacity admin members (UPNs or object IDs)
AAD admin object ID for Synapse
AAD admin login name for Synapse
Synapse SQL admin password (required by API even when using AAD)
Optional CMK URI for OpenAI/Cosmos. Leave empty for first deploy.

properties.displayName: Heimdall — Key Vault requires private link

metadata.description: If true, this is the primary region
Region code of partner region (for naming partner resources)
Whether the DR region is being deployed alongside primary. Controls Cosmos multi-region writes and ACR geo-replication on the primary side.
RG that holds the private DNS zones consumed by this region. Defaults to the local RG so each region is independent.
Log Analytics workspace ID for diagnostic settings
If true this is the primary region; private DNS zones live here
Object IDs that should receive Key Vault Administrator role
Create a geo-replica in replicaLocation. Set false for single-region deployment.
Whether to add the secondary region to the Cosmos account locations array. Set false for single-region deployment; can be flipped to true later (Cosmos supports adding regions online).
Customer-managed key URI (Key Vault key) — leave empty to skip CMK
Key Vault resource ID for CMK access (RBAC will be assigned)
AAD principal object IDs to grant Cosmos data-plane access (Built-in Data Contributor). Required for humans/auditors to query Data Explorer because local (key) auth is disabled.

properties.locations: [if(parameters('enableSecondaryRegion'), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', true()), createObject('locationName', parameters('secondaryLocation'), 'failoverPriority', 1, 'isZoneRedundant', false())), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', true())))]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the partner namespace for geo-DR (set on primary only)
If true, create geo-DR alias (only on primary region)

copy.name: cgs
copy.count: [length(createArray(createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'asa'), createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'orchestrator'), createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'fabric'), createObject('hub', 'decision.events', 'cg', 'orchestrator'), createObject('hub', 'decision.events', 'cg', 'fabric'), createObject('hub', 'feature.events', 'cg', 'aml'), createObject('hub', 'feature.events', 'cg', 'fabric')))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', variables('nsName'), createArray(createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'asa'), createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'orchestrator'), createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'fabric'), createObject('hub', 'decision.events', 'cg', 'orchestrator'), createObject('hub', 'decision.events', 'cg', 'fabric'), createObject('hub', 'feature.events', 'cg', 'aml'), createObject('hub', 'feature.events', 'cg', 'fabric'))[copyIndex()].hub, createArray(createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'asa'), createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'orchestrator'), createObject('hub', 'txn.events', 'cg', 'fabric'), createObject('hub', 'decision.events', 'cg', 'orchestrator'), createObject('hub', 'decision.events', 'cg', 'fabric'), createObject('hub', 'feature.events', 'cg', 'aml'), createObject('hub', 'feature.events', 'cg', 'fabric'))[copyIndex()].cg)]

properties.query:
WITH Enriched AS (
            SELECT
              t.transactionId,
              t.cardId,
              t.merchantId,
              t.amount,
              t.currency,
              t.eventTimestamp,
              System.Timestamp() AS processedAt
            FROM txnInput t
          ),
          Aggregated AS (
            SELECT
              cardId,
              System.Timestamp() AS windowEnd,
              COUNT(*) AS txnCount5m,
              SUM(amount) AS amountSum5m,
              AVG(amount) AS amountAvg5m,
              MAX(amount) AS amountMax5m
            FROM Enriched
            GROUP BY cardId, TumblingWindow(minute, 5)
          )
          SELECT * INTO featuresHub FROM Aggregated;
          SELECT * INTO featuresCosmos FROM Aggregated;

metadata.description: Private DNS zone ID for privatelink.api.azureml.ms
Private DNS zone ID for privatelink.notebooks.azure.net
TPM for chat model in thousands per minute (e.g., 60 -> 60K TPM)
TPM for embedding model in thousands per minute

properties.encryption: [if(empty(parameters('cmkKeyUri')), null(), createObject('keySource', 'Microsoft.KeyVault', 'keyVaultProperties', createObject('keyVaultUri', substring(parameters('cmkKeyUri'), 0, indexOf(parameters('cmkKeyUri'), '/keys/')), 'keyName', split(parameters('cmkKeyUri'), '/')[5])))]

metadata.description: Workspace primary shared key — pulled at deploy time via listKeys
User-assigned identity resource ID OR empty to use system-assigned

resources.name: [format('ca-orchestrator-{0}-{1}', parameters('env'), parameters('regionCode'))]
resources.identity: [if(empty(parameters('userAssignedIdentityId')), createObject('type', 'SystemAssigned'), createObject('type', 'SystemAssigned, UserAssigned', 'userAssignedIdentities', createObject(format('{0}', parameters('userAssignedIdentityId')), createObject())))]

resources.name: [format('ca-scoring-{0}-{1}', parameters('env'), parameters('regionCode'))]
resources.identity: [if(empty(parameters('userAssignedIdentityId')), createObject('type', 'SystemAssigned'), createObject('type', 'SystemAssigned, UserAssigned', 'userAssignedIdentities', createObject(format('{0}', parameters('userAssignedIdentityId')), createObject())))]

metadata.description: Origin host for scoring API (ACA FQDN)
Origin host for agentic console (ACA FQDN)
AAD object IDs of capacity admins
SQL admin login (use AAD where possible — this is required by API)
Resource IDs of data sources to grant Purview MSI Reader on
Application Insights resource ID for scoring API

allOf.query:
customEvents
| where name == "TransactionDecision"
| extend decision = tostring(customDimensions.decision)
| summarize total=count(), declines=countif(decision == "DECLINE") by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| extend declineRate = todouble(declines) / todouble(total)
| where declineRate > 0.20

properties.description: Cosmos DB request rate too large (429)
Event Hubs incoming messages outpacing outgoing
